message:
Command `
echo "=== DRT check $(date) ==="
STEP70_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
stat "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
wc -l "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null
tail -8 "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null
echo "--- dir ---"
ls -lh "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null
ls -lh "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
echo "--- process ---"
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "OpenROAD PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB", "TIME:"$10}' || echo "OpenROAD has EXITED"
echo "--- run log tail ---"
wc -l /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log 2>/dev/null
tail -5 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log 2>/dev/null
echo "--- run dirs ---"
ls -la "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^d" | tail -5
` executed with exit code 0.
